title: Purgosea concinna
taxonomy: Purgosea concinna is classified as a species of moth in the family Erebidae, specifically within the subfamily Arctiinae. This classification places it within the order Lepidoptera, which comprises butterflies and moths. The Erebidae family is a large and diverse group of moths, with over 11,000 species spread across various subfamilies. Purgosea concinna is further divided within the subfamily Arctiinae, also known as the tiger moths or woolly bears. The exact classification of Purgosea concinna is based on its unique characteristics, including its appearance and behavior.
